title: project source in findings store
goal: Add 'project' to FINDING_SOURCES in findingsStore.ts so 'mini findings add --source project' is accepted and the value survives the parse -> serialize round-trip; extend findingsStore.test.ts to cover it. Additive only, no behaviour change for adversarial/verify, and existing findings without a Source line still parse as adversarial.

steps.title: Add project to FindingSource type and array
steps.detail: Extend the FindingSource union (line 56) and the FINDING_SOURCES array (line 61) in findingsStore.ts with 'project'. isFindingSource('project') returns true, DEFAULT_FINDING_SOURCE stays adversarial. Build green.

steps.title: Round-trip test for source: project
steps.detail: In findingsStore.test.ts add a case that serializes a finding with source 'project' and parses it back, asserting the **Source:** project line survives intact.

steps.title: Regression guard: defaults and existing sources unchanged
steps.detail: Assert that a finding with no **Source:** line still parses as adversarial, and that adversarial/verify round-trips are unaffected — no behaviour change for existing sources.

steps.title: Full test suite + typecheck green
steps.detail: Run the whole suite and tsc; confirm no snapshot or type regression from the widened union.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 161: project source in findings store
